achievements_dev_desc: Achievements system is currently under development.

admin_approve_payout_needed: Admin approval needed for actual payout. Use 'Admin Approve Payout' below.
admin_danh_dau_tranh_chap_freeze: Admin Danh Dau Tranh Chap Freeze
admin_duyet_qua_escrow_simulator_dev: Admin Duyet Qua Escrow Simulator Dev
admin_review_proof_needed: Manual Admin review needed. Use 'Admin Approve Proof' below to confirm.
all_payout_funding_blocked: All payouts and funding are blocked during a dispute
all_players_ranked_by_selected_achieveme: All players ranked by selected achievement metric
rules_tiebreak_subtitle: When multiple players have the same points, the system applies tiebreaks in the following order of priority.
rules_tiebreak_swiss_desc: Swiss Round: all players play multiple matches, points accumulate, no elimination between matches.

rules_tiebreak_swiss_items.label: Total Points
rules_tiebreak_swiss_items.desc: Cumulative points throughout all matches in the round (higher = better).

rules_tiebreak_swiss_items.label: Total Placement
rules_tiebreak_swiss_items.desc: Sum of placement positions (lower = better average). Ex: 1+2+3=6 beats 3+4+5=12.

rules_tiebreak_swiss_items.label: Top 1 Count
rules_tiebreak_swiss_items.desc: Number of matches finishing in 1st place (higher = priority).

rules_tiebreak_swiss_items.label: Best Placement
rules_tiebreak_swiss_items.desc: Single best placement achieved in any match (lower = better).

rules_tiebreak_elimination_desc: Elimination Round: top N from each lobby advance, others are eliminated.

rules_tiebreak_elimination_items.label: Match Placement
rules_tiebreak_elimination_items.desc: Direct ranking in that match (top N advance, bottom eliminated). For BO1 format.

rules_tiebreak_elimination_items.label: Match Score
rules_tiebreak_elimination_items.desc: If placement is tied, use in-game score as tiebreaker.

rules_tiebreak_elimination_bo_desc: Elimination Round (BO): Play a fixed number of matches with the same group, then aggregate points to eliminate bottom players.

rules_tiebreak_elimination_bo_items.label: Total Series Points
rules_tiebreak_elimination_bo_items.desc: Cumulative points from the BOx series to determine advancement.

rules_tiebreak_elimination_bo_items.label: Total Placement
rules_tiebreak_elimination_bo_items.desc: Sum of placement positions across the series (lower = priority).

rules_tiebreak_elimination_bo_items.label: Top 1 Count
rules_tiebreak_elimination_bo_items.desc: Higher number of 1st place finishes in the series takes priority.

rules_tiebreak_checkmate_desc: Checkmate Round: play until someone reaches win condition (1st place or point threshold).

rules_tiebreak_checkmate_items.label: Total Accumulated Points
rules_tiebreak_checkmate_items.desc: If no one reaches Checkmate, use total points as temporary ranking.

rules_tiebreak_points_desc: Points Round: play multiple matches, ranked by total cumulative points.

rules_tiebreak_points_items.label: Total Points
rules_tiebreak_points_items.desc: Cumulative points across all matches (higher = better).

rules_tiebreak_points_items.label: Best Placement
rules_tiebreak_points_items.desc: Single best placement achieved in any match.

rules_tiebreak_points_items.label: Top 1 Count
rules_tiebreak_points_items.desc: Number of matches finishing in 1st place.

rules_tiebreak_round_robin_desc: Round Robin: players rotate and face different opponents, ranked by total points.

rules_tiebreak_round_robin_items.label: Total Placement
rules_tiebreak_round_robin_items.desc: Lower sum of placements = better average.

rules_tiebreak_round_robin_items.label: Top 1 Count
rules_tiebreak_round_robin_items.desc: Number of matches finishing in 1st place.

random_assignment_desc: Players are assigned to lobbies randomly, without considering their performance or rank.
seeded_assignment_desc: Players are assigned to lobbies based on their performance, rank, or other seeding criteria to ensure balanced or strategic matchups.
rule_1: All participants must register before the registration deadline.
rule_2: Players must use the same Riot account throughout the tournament.
rule_3: In case of a tie, the player with the highest number of first-place finishes wins.
rule_4: Any form of cheating or unsportsmanlike conduct will result in disqualification.
escrow_desc: This tournament is protected by our Escrow system. The prize pool has been pre-deposited by the host and is securely held by the platform.
community_desc: This tournament operates in community mode. The prize pool is dynamically adjusted based on the total entry fees collected.
discord_channel_desc: Join the organizer's Discord server for the latest updates and announcements.
no_description_provided: No description provided by the host.
and_are_intended_only_for_local_staging_: and are intended only for local/staging testing.
are_you_sure_financial: This affects revenue calculations immediately. Are you sure?
